reasoning: Let's focus on improving your lactate clearance. Your 5 to 20-minute power drop highlights an opportunity to boost your aerobic base and build fatigue resistance. By training on Emigration Canyon, you're mirroring the efforts you'll tackle on the Alpine Loop's main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform over-unders, alternating 5 minutes at 242-256W and 5 minutes at 209-223W. Repeat 4 times.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
